title: Jamshedpur, Jharkhand — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Jamshedpur, Jharkhand: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Jamshedpur is a city in Jharkhand with a population of 1,350,000. India’s first planned industrial city, home to Tata Steel, known for its lush greenery, lakes, and high quality of life.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
